Property.Name: ConfirmedDateCategory
Property.sap:label: Deliv. Date Category
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date Category of Delivery Date in Supplier Confirmation

Property.Name: CreatedBy
Property.sap:label: Created by
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object

Property.Name: UpdatedBy
Property.sap:label: Updated by
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person Who Changed Object

Property.Name: CreatedTime
Property.sap:label: Created at
Property.sap:quickinfo: Time at Which Suppluer Confirmation was Created

Property.Name: OrderNetPriceAmount
Property.sap:label: Net Order Price
Property.sap:quickinfo: Net Price in Purchasing Document (in Document Currency)

Property.Name: LastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Last changed at
Property.sap:quickinfo: UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)

Property.Name: CompanyCodeName
Property.sap:label: Company Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Company Code or Company

Property.Name: CreditControlArea_Text
Property.sap:quickinfo: Description of the credit control area

Property.Name: NonTaxableTransactionTaxCode
Property.sap:label: Output Tax Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Output Tax Code for Non-Taxable Transactions

Property.Name: DocDateIsUsedForTaxDetn
Property.sap:label: Tax Determ.with Doc.Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Document Date As the Basis for Tax Determination

Property.Name: TaxRptgDateIsActive
Property.sap:label: Tax Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Reporting Date Active in Documents

Property.Name: CashDiscountBaseAmtIsNetAmt
Property.sap:label: Net Discount Base
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Discount base amount is the net value

Property.Name: IsMarkedForArchiving
Property.sap:label: Archiving Flag
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central archiving marker for master record

Property.Name: PurchasingDocumentType_Text
Property.sap:label: Doc. Type Descript.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Short Description of Purchasing Document Type

Property.Name: PurchasingDocumentSubtype
Property.sap:label: Control indicator
Property.sap:quickinfo: Control indicator for purchasing document type

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created By
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person who Created the Object

Property.Name: IsOneTimeAccount
Property.sap:label: One-time account
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is the account a one-time account?

Property.Name: InternationalLocationNumber3
Property.sap:label: Check Digit
Property.sap:quickinfo: Check digit for the international location number

Property.Name: AlternativePayeeAccountNumber
Property.sap:label: Alternative Payee
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account Number of the Alternative Payee

Property.Name: TaxNumberResponsible
Property.sap:label: Tax Number
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Number at Responsible Tax Authority

Property.Name: UK_VerifiedTaxStatus
Property.sap:label: Tax Status
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Status of the Verified Subcontractor

Property.Name: ReferenceAccountGroup
Property.sap:label: Reference Acct Group
Property.sap:quickinfo: Reference Account Group for One-Time Account (Vendor)

Property.Name: FiscalAddress
Property.sap:label: Fiscal Address
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account number of the master record with fiscal address

Property.Name: BirthDate
Property.sap:label: Date of Birth
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date of Birth of the Person Subject to Withholding Tax

Property.Name: DeletionIndicator
Property.sap:label: Deletion Flag
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central Deletion Flag for Master Record

Property.Name: SuplrProofOfDelivRlvtCode
Property.sap:label: Relevant for POD
Property.sap:quickinfo: Supplier indicator relevant for proof of delivery

Property.Name: AU_PayerIsPayingToCarryOnEnt
Property.sap:label: Enterprise in AU
Property.sap:quickinfo: Is payer making payment in course of carrying on enterprise

Property.Name: AU_IndividualIsUnder18
Property.sap:quickinfo: Is an individual under 18 and payment does not exceed $350

Property.Name: AU_PaymentIsExceeding75
Property.sap:label: Payment Does not Exc
Property.sap:quickinfo: The payment does not exceed $75, excl. GST

Property.Name: AU_PaymentIsWhollyInputTaxed
Property.sap:label: Wholly Input Taxed
Property.sap:quickinfo: The supply that the payment relates to is wholly input taxed

Property.Name: AU_PartnerIsSupplyWithoutGain
Property.sap:label: Individual w/o Gain
Property.sap:quickinfo: The supply is made by an individual without gain

Property.Name: AU_SupplierIsEntitledToABN
Property.sap:label: ABN Eligible
Property.sap:quickinfo: The supplier is not entitled to an ABN

Property.Name: AU_PaymentIsIncomeExempted
Property.sap:label: Payment Exempt
Property.sap:quickinfo: The whole of the payment is exempt income.

Property.Name: AU_SupplyIsMadeAsPrivateHobby
Property.sap:quickinfo: An activity done as a private recreational pursuit

Property.Name: AU_SupplyMadeIsOfDmstcNature
Property.sap:quickinfo: wholly of a private or domestic nature

Property.Name: SuplrManufacturerExternalName
Property.sap:label: Ext. manufacturer
Property.sap:quickinfo: External manufacturer code name or number

Property.Name: DataMediumExchangeIndicator
Property.sap:label: DME Recipient Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Recipient Code for Data Medium Exchange

Property.Name: DataExchangeInstructionKey
Property.sap:label: Instruction Key
Property.sap:quickinfo: Instruction Key for Data Medium Exchange

Property.Name: AlternativePayeeIsAllowed
Property.sap:label: Payee in Document
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Alternative Payee in Document Allowed?

Property.Name: TranspServiceAgentStstcGrp
Property.sap:label: Stat. Grp, Agent
Property.sap:quickinfo: Shipment: statistics group, transportation service agent

Property.Name: SuplrTaxAuthorityAccountNumber
Property.sap:label: Tax Office
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account Number of Master Record of Tax Office Responsible

Property.Name: SupplierCentralDeletionIsBlock
Property.sap:label: Central Del. Block
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central deletion block for master record

Property.Name: CollectiveNumberingIsRelevant
Property.sap:label: Rel. for Coll. No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Cross Docking: Relevant for Collective Numbering
